headline: 3 Reasons H is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since June 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 74.9%. But one standout stock has nearly doubled the market - over the past five years, Hyatt Hotels has surged 139% to $193.68 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 27.4% in the last six months, beating the S&P by 19.4%.
